name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement

---

## Problem

Describe the problem this feature would solve. What are you trying to do that you can't do today?

## Proposed solution

Describe your preferred solution. How should it work from the user's perspective?

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why did you rule them out?

## Additional context

Any mockups, references, or related issues.
